TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Song_Hye-kyo, title = Song_Hye-kyo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Song_Hye-kyo} }

S.FORM: == Song Hui Qiyaw == u siwkay niza Song Hui Qiyaw(1981.11.22), tatayna, u palaway nu Korea. natahkal ciniza i 1996 a mihca. namipalaw tu tilibi atu iga. sangulan ku bihid, nasikawaw tu motul. 2017.7.5 macawa tu, u acawama niza sa ci Song Cong Ci, u palaway tu. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Ťá™1996 " ŤąáRain . u sulit nu Amilika Song Hye-kyo (born November 22, 1981) is a South Korean actress. She gained popularity through her leading roles in television dramas Autumn in My Heart(2000), All In (2003), Full House (2004), That Winter, the Wind Blows (2013) and Descendants of the Sun (2016) which achieved pan-Asia success. She has also starred in films Hwang Jin Yi (2007), The Grandmaster (2013), My Brilliant Life (2014) and The Queens (2015). In 2017, she ranked 7th in Forbes magazine's Korea Power Celebrity list. The success of Song's television dramas internationally established her as a top Hallyustar. u sulit nu Lipun u kawlah niza . (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: == soŇč ńßui *ijaw == u siwkaj niza soŇč ńßui *ijaw(****.**.**), tatajna, u par~…ĺawaj nu kor…ôa. natańßkar~…ĺ ¶iniza i **** a mińß ¶a. namipar~…ĺaw tu tir~…ĺibi atu iga. saŇčur~…ĺan ku bińßid, nasikawaw tu motur~…ĺ. ****.*.* ma ¶awa tu, u a ¶awama niza sa ¶i soŇč ¶oŇč ¶i, u par~…ĺawaj tu. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** " **ain . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika soŇč ńßj…ô-kjo (born no*…ômb…ôr **, ****) is a soutńß kor…ôan a ¶tr…ôss. sńß…ô gain…ôd popur~…ĺaritj tńßrougńß ńß…ôr r~…ĺ…ôadiŇč ror~…ĺ…ôs in t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision dramas autumn in mj ńß…ôart(****), ar~…ĺr~…ĺ in (****), fur~…ĺr~…ĺ ńßous…ô (****), tńßat wint…ôr, tńß…ô wind br~…ĺows (****) and d…ôs ¶…ôndants of tńß…ô sun (****) wńßi ¶ńß a ¶ńßi…ô*…ôd pan-asia su ¶ ¶…ôss. sńß…ô ńßas ar~…ĺso starr…ôd in fir~…ĺms ńßwaŇč *in ji (****), tńß…ô grandmast…ôr (****), mj brir~…ĺr~…ĺiant r~…ĺif…ô (****) and tńß…ô *u…ô…ôns (****). in ****, sńß…ô rank…ôd *tńß in forb…ôs magazin…ô Ē~ °s kor…ôa pow…ôr ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôbritj r~…ĺist. tńß…ô su ¶ ¶…ôss of soŇč Ē~ °s t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision dramas int…ôrnationar~…ĺr~…ĺj …ôstabr~…ĺisńß…ôd ńß…ôr as a top ńßar~…ĺr~…ĺjustar. u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun u kawr~…ĺańß niza . (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: == Song Hui Qiyaw == u siwkay niza Song Hui Qiyaw(1981.11.22), tatayna, u palaway nu Korea. natahkal ciniza i 1996 a mihca. namipalaw tu tilibi atu iga. sangulan ku bihid, nasikawaw tu motul. 2017.7.5 macawa tu, u acawama niza sa ci Song Cong Ci, u palaway tu. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Ťá™1996 " ŤąáRain . u sulit nu Amilika Song Hye-kyo (born November 22, 1981) is a South Korean actress. She gained popularity through her leading roles in television dramas Autumn in My Heart(2000), All In (2003), Full House (2004), That Winter, the Wind Blows (2013) and Descendants of the Sun (2016) which achieved pan-Asia success. She has also starred in films Hwang Jin Yi (2007), The Grandmaster (2013), My Brilliant Life (2014) and The Queens (2015). In 2017, she ranked 7th in Forbes magazine's Korea Power Celebrity list. The success of Song's television dramas internationally established her as a top Hallyustar. u sulit nu Lipun u kawlah niza .
